name: Seasoned Olive Oil (Chicken-fat Alternative)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion and oil in a 2-quart heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to simmering.
4. Partially cover and cook, stirring often to prevent the onions from sticking to the bottom of the pan until they begin to brown.
5. Remove from heat, uncover, and let stand to cool.
6. Strain through a fine sieve.
7. Store in a tightly closed jar.
